name_en: ❤️B's pure vintage check Boston bag 😘 Retro and stylish, cute to carry
name_cn:
❤️B's pure vintage check Boston bag 😘 Retro and stylish, cute to carry
With a long strap for crossbody wear-
New large size available for selection, the large size is very spacious
A very classic bag, great for daily outfits 🔥 Made from eco-friendly material
Waterproof and stain-resistant canvas, lightweight and spacious, super versatile. A top pick on social media
This is a must-have style this year
Size: 30 x 15 x 21
